case_title: SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING INC. VS SPLAWSKI, GEORGE DBA RETAIL FACILITIES GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,591.45 FILED BY SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPLAWSKI, GEORGE DBA RETAIL FACILITIES GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (POS FEE $38.00) SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPLAWSKI, GEORGE DBA RETAIL FACILITIES GROUP
NOTICE RE CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-26-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-07-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED. CONTINUE FOR TRIAL.
DEFT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE HEARING, FILED. FILING UNTIMELY. TO BE CONSIDERED DURING THE HEARING. NOT COPIED TO THE OTHER PARTY AND NO $10.00 FEE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPLAWSKI, GEORGE DBA RETAIL FACILITIES GROUP $2,591.45 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,679.45, DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
